gist.headline: Daily News Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the README with the latest news from the hive.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the Latest News section in the repository README.
gist.impact: Keeps the GitHub landing page current with recent project updates and announcements.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot or bee updating a digital bulletin board or reading a newspaper, representing the automated news refresh.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a fresh news clipping to a wooden bulletin board. The bee mascot hovers nearby reading a tiny pixelated newspaper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
